description: Pump P-101A tripped repeatedly on high bearing vibration VT-2310 above 11 mm/s
root_cause: Worn drive-end bearing and minor shaft misalignment
action_taken: Replaced DE and NDE bearings; laser aligned coupling to 0.05 mm

description: P-101A trip on low cooling water flow FT-2301 below 180 m3/h
root_cause: Cooling tower make-up valve stuck closed dropping V-201 level
action_taken: Freed make-up valve and restored surge vessel level; reset interlock I-CW-07

description: Mechanical seal leak on P-101A discharge
root_cause: Single mechanical seal failure after 14 months service
action_taken: Replaced mechanical seal cartridge; flushed seal plan 11

description: Quarterly PM on standby pump P-101B
action_taken: Greased bearings; tested auto-start on P-101A trip; OK

description: HX-12 high cooling water outlet temperature TT-2330
root_cause: Plate fouling and partial gasket bypass
action_taken: Opened exchanger; cleaned plates; replaced 6 gaskets

description: P-101A bearing vibration alarm recurring third time this fiscal year
root_cause: Repeated bearing failures suggest baseplate softfoot
action_taken: Shimmed baseplate to correct softfoot; vibration back to 2.8 mm/s

description: Statutory external visual inspection of surge vessel V-201
action_taken: Visual inspection complete; minor external coating breakdown noted

description: Cooling tower CT-01 fill and nozzle cleaning
